cgu_meta_desc: MiGallery's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, the photo gallery of the MiTV Association.
cgu_subtitle: MiGallery - Photo gallery of the MiTV Association
cgu_s1_intro: For a clear understanding of these terms:
cgu_s1_service: The Service: Refers to the MiGallery application and its API.
cgu_s1_user: The User: Any person holding an account linked to the École des Mines de Saint-Étienne (EMSE).
cgu_s1_immich: Immich: The open-source software solution used as the "backend" for photo storage and analysis.
cgu_s2_auth_body: Access is provided through the École des Mines single sign-on portal (OIDC / CAS). MiGallery neither processes nor stores any password.
cgu_s2_hosting_body: Data is hosted on a private server managed by the MiTV association, physically located at the Maison des Élèves, 20 Boulevard Alexandre de Fraissinette, 42100 Saint-Étienne. No photo data is stored on public clouds.
cgu_s2_avail_body: The service is provided "as is". Interruptions for maintenance or network failure may occur.
cgu_s3_intro: MiGallery uses facial recognition technology to make photo sorting easier. This processing of biometric data relies strictly on your explicit consent.
cgu_s3_init: Initialization: The user voluntarily uploads a reference photo (selfie).
cgu_s3_verify: Verification: The system checks the uniqueness of the face.
cgu_s3_process: Processing: The photo is analyzed by the buffalo_l AI model (via Immich) to generate a biometric vector.
cgu_s3_delete: Source deletion: The reference photo is automatically deleted within 24h. Only the encrypted biometric vector is kept.
cgu_s3_myphotos_body: Enabling it grants access to the "My Photos" tab, visible by default only to you and administrators.
cgu_s3_spectator: Viewer Mode: You may allow other users to see your identified photos. This is your responsibility and can be revoked at any time.
cgu_s3_revoke_body: You can withdraw your consent via Settings → Danger zone. This triggers the immediate deletion of your biometric vector.
cgu_s4_retention_body: MiGallery archives student life. Photos are kept for an indefinite duration for historical and heritage purposes.
cgu_s4_logs_body: Technical logs (IP, timestamp) are kept temporarily for security, without storing any password.
cgu_s4_right_access: Right of access: View all photos associated with your profile.
cgu_s4_right_rectif: Rectification/Deletion: Request the blurring or removal of a harmful photo by contacting bureau@mitv.fr.
cgu_s4_right_forget: Right to be forgotten: Deleting your account erases your preferences and biometric data.
cgu_s5_body1: Only MiTV members can upload albums. The association retains the exploitation rights.
cgu_s5_body2: It is forbidden to scrape the content, use it for commercial purposes, or deceive the facial recognition system.
cgu_contact_editor_body:
